使用说明：
1. >>>: 此行说明样例中使用的代码模式用法
2. []: 中括号内为16进制，不是2进制
3. ---: 分割线用于分割不同样例
4. >: 翻译出的机器码


>>> imm rs1 010 rd 0000011 LW

lw a0, 8(zero)

[008] 00000 010 01010 0000011

> 00802503

---

>>> imm rs2 rs1 010 imm 0100011 SW

sw a0, 12(zero)

0000000 01010 00000 010 01100 0100011

> 00a02623

---

>>> imm rs1 100 rd 0000011 LBU

lbu a1, 12(zero)

[00c] 00000 100 01011 0000011

> 00c04583

--- 

>>> imm rs1 000 rd 0010011 ADDI
>>> imm rs2 rs1 000 imm 0100011 SB
>>> imm rs1 010 rd 0000011 LW

addi a2, zero, 16
> [010] 00000 000 01100 0010011
> 01000613

addi a3, zero, [90]
> [090] 00000 000 01101 0010011
> 09000693

sb a3, 3(a2)
> 0000000 01101 01100 000 00011 0100011
> 00d601a3

addi a3, zero, [ab]
> [0ab] 00000 000 01101 0010011
> 0ab00693

sb a3, 2(a2)
> 0000000 01101 01100 000 00010 0100011
> 00d60123

addi a3, zero, [cd]
> 0cd00693

sb a3, 1(a2)
> 0000000 01101 01100 000 00001 0100011
> 00d600a3

addi a3, zero, [ef]
> 0ef00693

sb a3, 0(a2)
> 0000000 01101 01100 000 00000 0100011
> 00d60023

lw a4, 0(a2)
> [000] 01100 010 01110 0000011
> 00062703

01000613
09000693
00d601a3
0ab00693
00d60123
0cd00693
00d600a3
0ef00693
00d60023
00062703

---
